calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Thomas Smith Richardss Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions And Costs Against Defendant And Defendants Counsel Of Record, Jointly And Severally, In The Amount Of $1,935.00; And Declaration Of Jonathan M. Kashani, Esq.
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT THOMAS SMITH RICHARDS' RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AND COSTS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANTS COUNSEL OF RECORD, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,935.00

No appearances. The court modifies its ruling to correct the name of the defendant who is the subject of the motion as follows: The unopposed motion to compel defendant Thomas Smith Richards to respond to plaintiff's requests for production of documents, set one, is granted. Defendant failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2031.300, subd. (a).) Defendant is ordered to serve verified responses, without objections, within 10 court days of entry of this order. In addition, the court awards reasonable sanctions of $500 on this motion; Defendant shall pay this sanction to plaintiff within 30 days. (Id., subd. (c); Rule of Court 3.1348, subd. (a).) The court does not find substantial justification. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Conklin Bros. Inc.S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions And Costs Against Defendant And Defendants Counsel Of Record, Jointly And Severally, In The Amount Of 1,935.00; And Declaration Of Jonathan M. Kashani, Esq.
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT CONKLIN BROS. INC.S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AND COSTS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL OF RECORD, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF 1,935.00

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel defendant Conklin Bros., Inc., to respond to plaintiff's form interrogatories, set one, is granted. Defendant failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2030.290, subd. (a).) Defendant is ordered to serve verified responses, without objections, within 10 court days of entry of this order. In addition, the court awards reasonable sanctions of $500 on this motion; Defendant shall pay this sanction to plaintiff within 30 days. (Id., subd. (c); Rule of Court 3.1348, subd. (a).) The court does not find substantial justification.

Plaintiff asks for the sanction to be levied jointly against defendant's counsel; the court may not do so without making a finding that counsel advised the conduct and has no basis to make such a finding.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED MATTERS IN REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, DIRECTED TO DEFENDANT CONKLIN BROS. INC.; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AND COSTS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL OF RECORD, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,935.00

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in his first set of requests for admission to defendant Conklin Bros. Inc. is granted. Defendant failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subd. (a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs is deemed admitted by this defendant. (Id., subds. (b), (c).) In addition, the court awards reasonable sanctions of $500 on this motion; Defendant shall pay this sanction to plaintiff within 30 days. (Id., subd. (c); Rule of Court 3.1348, subd. (a).) Sanctions are mandatory on this motion. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel defendant Thomas Smith Richards, to respond to plaintiff's form interrogatories, set one, is granted. Defendant failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2030.290, subd. (a).) Defendant is ordered to serve verified responses, without objections, within 10 court days of entry of this order. In addition, the court awards reasonable sanctions of $500 on this motion; Defendant shall pay this sanction to plaintiff within 30 days. (Id., subd. (c); Rule of Court 3.1348, subd. (a).) The court does not find substantial justification. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
